title: ما هي الحزم والتعبير عن النفس؟
citation: Alberti, R.E., & Emmons, M.L. (2008). Your perfect right: Assertiveness and equality in your life and relationships (9th ed.). Impact Publishers.
content: [CONTENT AUTHOR REQUIRED] Gulf Arabic adaptation (~350 words). Cover: assertiveness as haqq (حق) and hikmah (حكمة), NOT Western self-advocacy. Distinguish from aggression or disrespect. Face-saving expression. Khaleeji register.
